task_completion.description: Navigate to the Support mailbox or Unassigned folder in FreeScout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeScout dashboard is visible, with the 'Support' mailbox or 'Unassigned' folder selected in the left sidebar.

task_completion.description: Locate the conversation with the subject 'Payment issue'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A conversation with the subject 'Payment issue' is visible in the list of conversations.
The detailed view of the conversation with the subject 'Payment issue' is open on the screen.
The assignment dropdown menu (usually a user icon or 'Assign' button) is clicked and expanded.

task_completion.description: Select 'Admin User' from the assignment options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Admin User' is highlighted or clicked within the assignment dropdown menu.

task_completion.description: Verify the conversation is assigned to 'Admin User'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The conversation detail view clearly shows 'Admin User' as the current assignee (typically in the right sidebar, top action bar, or via a system message in the thread stating the conversation was assigned to Admin User).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with FreeScout.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is open showing the FreeScout application, rather than a terminal, script editor, or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the assignment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element/DevTools) are not open in any of the screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database management tools are visible executing SQL commands or scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target conversation subject is exactly 'Payment issue'. The target assignee name is exactly 'Admin User'.
